data.name: lbl_AboutBot
data.value: Now you can communicate with your customers across all local networks through instant chat on a large scale by each by achieving a balance between meeting customer requests at the same time, promptly and usefully.

data.name: lbl_AboutBotTitle
data.value: chat is a way of communicating with customers through a messaging widget on your website. It’s like instant messaging that you’re used to on Facebook Messenger, Instagram DMs, WhatsApp, etc. but between a business and website visitors.

data.name: lbl_AboutProjectSubTitle
data.value: We put your business world in your hands through our applications to follow up, manage reports and process tasks.

data.name: lbl_CofirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this menu?

data.name: lbl_CofirmDeleteApp
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this application?

data.name: lbl_CofirmDeleteAuto
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this AutoMessage?

data.name: lbl_CofirmDeleteClient
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this number?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this package?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this period?

data.name: lbl_CofirmDeleteReportCollection
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this collection?

data.name: lbl_CofirmDeleteSubscription
data.value: Are you sure to cancel your subscription?

data.name: lbl_CofirmRenewSub
data.value: Are you sure you want to renew this package?

data.name: lbl_CofirmResendSub
data.value: Are you sure you want to resend this package?

data.name: lbl_CofirmUpdateSecretkey
data.value: Are you sure you want to update this secret key?

data.name: lbl_ConfirmDeleteReport
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this report?

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this text?

data.name: lbl_ConfrimCodeSending
data.value: Confirmation code has been sent successfully

data.name: lbl_DaysUserValidation
data.value: Must enter Days number or select a user

data.name: lbl_EditActivityConfrim
data.value: Are you really want to edit your status?

data.name: lbl_EnterConfirmationCode
data.value: Enter confirmation code that sent to find out everthing new and useful

data.name: lbl_FooterAbout1
data.value: Chat MalyBot and administrative solutions developed for meeting all changes in all different businesses sectors and activities in the financial and human resources management.

data.name: lbl_Getconnected
data.value: Get connected with us on social networks:

data.name: lbl_nameApplication
data.value: Let's start with a name for your Application

data.name: lbl_NumberConfirmationText
data.value: Please enter your number...to receive the latest news

data.name: lbl_NumberForConfirm
data.value: Type the number you want to confirm

data.name: lbl_OrderNotAccepted
data.value: The order could not be accepted for not exceeding allowable limit

data.name: lbl_OurPackages1
data.value: Package gives customers access to a product or a service for a period of time and you get extra benefits.

data.name: lbl_OurServices11
data.value: A 24/7 support service offered by a professional team with excellent expertise in software engineering, computer engineering, accounting/management system deployment.

data.name: lbl_OurServices21
data.value: After assessing your existing systems and business performance, our consultants suggest the best solutions that help you grow your business and make insightful financial decisions.

data.name: lbl_OurServices31
data.value: Our experts train your team on every feature and function of the system, making sure that you get the most out of it.

data.name: lbl_OurServices41
data.value: Our experts provide clients with guidance and support on each step of the deployment process, including system configuration, backup plans, and specification of role-based authorities and permissions.

data.name: lbl_OurServices51
data.value: Chat MalyBot For flexible configuration, user-friendly, secure data-saving and prompt outcomes.

data.name: lbl_OurServices61
data.value: For the flexibility and capability of expansion for achieving strong performance.

data.name: lbl_OurServices71
data.value: For achieving balanced growth during business activities and organizational structure expansion.

data.name: lbl_OurServices91
data.value: We provide the best and wonderful experience with MalyBot platform to support multinational clients as per customer satisfaction

data.name: lbl_OurServicesSubTitle
data.value: We provide a complete, premium business management system to help corporates transform performance, achieve sustainable growth, and manage their finances and accounting operations more easily and efficiently.

data.name: lbl_QAbout11
data.value: For enterprise organization via solutions that achieve performance accuracy, resources efficiency and better investment.

data.name: lbl_QAbout12
data.value: For achieving balanced growth during business activities and organizational structure expansion.

data.name: lbl_QAbout13
data.value: For the flexibility and capability of expansion for achieving strong performance.

data.name: lbl_QAbout21
data.value: Controlling businesses through displaying transactions movement details by time, user or branch.

data.name: lbl_QAbout22
data.value: Create automatic replies to customers and make lists

data.name: lbl_QAbout32
data.value: For sending financial transaction’s notification to clients and suppliers; or accounts balances to the top management to be updated on the organization performance, then an SMS or Email is sent automatically after configuring the necessary information of SMS, Notifications, Sending Options and Recipients. The following are the main advantages:

data.name: lbl_QAbout33
data.value: Direct access for the transaction notifications by the concerned persons.

data.name: lbl_QAbout34
data.value: Getting the required information without logging into the system.

data.name: lbl_QAbout35
data.value: Updating accounts balances after carrying out any transactions.

data.name: lbl_serviceApi1
data.value: API connectivity service on the MalyBot platform

data.name: lbl_serviceApi2
data.value: We provide a wonderful and unique service, as we connect all systems of various types and technologies with our service, the MalyBot service, with ease, integration and absolute professionalism.

data.name: lbl_serviceApi3
data.value: Send reports, results, notifications, or any other information to all your customers via the WhatsApp application automatically, based on your preferred settings.

data.name: lbl_serviceApi4
data.value: Saving the time and effort spent on manual preparation of reports, preparing them and sending them to customers with all their data collected from the system, whether (reports, test results, or statements of accounts) via WhatsApp.

data.name: lbl_serviceApi5
data.value: Sending immediate notifications to customers, whether notifications about (updates, payment confirmation, order status, emergency) for example, and other information.

data.name: lbl_serviceApi6
data.value: Achieve an outstanding user experience by customizing and designing messages and using custom commands, templates and appropriate formats, according to the required needs.

data.name: lbl_serviceMsg1
data.value: WhatsApp messaging service provided by the MalyBot platform

data.name: lbl_serviceMsg2
data.value: The service offers the ability to automatically respond to customer requests, which makes it easier for you to interact quickly and effectively with them

data.name: lbl_serviceMsg3
data.value: You can easily improve your customer self-services by automatically responding to their requests and inquiries by using the service with the WhatsApp application.

data.name: lbl_serviceMsg4
data.value: By using this service, you can improve customer experience and interact with them quickly and effectively. When customers contact you via WhatsApp, they receive an automated response that can contain useful information or a reference to available self-services.

data.name: lbl_serviceMsg5
data.value: Automatically responding to customer requests via WhatsApp is a useful way to provide self-support, answer frequently asked questions instantly, and relieve pressure on the human support team. You can also customize auto-reply messages according to your needs and business requirements.

data.name: lbl_services11
data.value: The WhatsApp messaging service provided by the MalyBot platform provides automatic response to customer requests, which facilitates quick and effective interaction with them. Using this service, you can customize auto-reply messages according to your needs and business requirements.

data.name: lbl_services21
data.value: Sending logos and alerts to all your customers by linking to the API, the service provided by the MalyBot platform as a very flexible service, regardless of the programming language used in your system.

data.name: lbl_subPackageFree
data.value: Are you sure to subscribe to the free package?

data.name: lbl_SubscriptionConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure to subscribe this package?

data.name: lbl_text1
data.value: Create innovative communication with your customers by connecting your website, online store, app, or sales systems with WhatsApp, the most popular messaging platform in the world.

data.name: lbl_text12
data.value: A secure and encrypted communication channel, and no third party can access your information

data.name: lbl_text13
data.value: Providing many ready-made lists that are in line with your business scope and commercial activity.

data.name: lbl_text21
data.value: Possibility of sending text and video media.

data.name: lbl_text22
data.value: Simple and easy to use interface.

data.name: lbl_text23
data.value: Pre-made text templates for your correspondence.

data.name: lbl_text32
data.value: Real accurate reports on the status of messages and numbers

data.name: lbl_UBot1
data.value: A chatbot is software that simulates human-like conversations with users via chat. Its key task is to answer user questions with instant messages.

data.name: lbl_UBot12
data.value: conversations with users via chat. Its key task

data.name: lbl_UBot13
data.value: is to answer user questions with instant messages.

data.name: lbl_Verification
data.value: Enter the verification code that we have sent to

data.name: lbl_video1
data.value: We provide you with innovative tools to transfer knowledge and communicate with your audience in an easy and attractive way. Through educational videos and a guide for use

data.name: lbl_video12
data.value: Videos explaining how to deal with the bot, create the number, etc.

data.name: msg_alreadySubscribed
data.value: you have already subscribed in this package

data.name: msg_alreadyWaiting
data.value: There is a request is already waiting

data.name: msg_CannotRunBot
data.value: Sorry...you can't run the bot. You don't have a subscription.

data.name: msg_DonotHaveSubscription
data.value: Can not add ! do not have subscription

data.name: msg_ExitError
data.value: Can't exit due to an error

data.name: msg_FModifiedPackageExpired
data.value: Failed to modify, your package has expired

data.name: msg_FSavePackageExpired
data.value: Failed to save, your package has expired

data.name: msg_ItemsRequired
data.value: At least you should add one item

data.name: msg_numberLarger
data.value: Number of clients is larger than allowed in the new package

data.name: msg_PackageServiceRequired
data.value: At least you should add one service

data.name: msg_RunError
data.value: Can't run due to an error

data.name: msg_unauthorizedWarning
data.value: Sorry, you're not authorized to access this resource. Please Login to continue

data.name: msg_usedPackageFree
data.value: Sorry, you've used your free package

data.name: msg_Verification
data.value: Not verified. Please verify the code
